bird.name: 義大利麻雀
bird.summary: 義大利麻雀（学名：Passer italiae）是雀科麻雀属一种。长期以来意大利麻雀是否为麻雀属的一个独立物种存在争议。2011年发现的遗传学证据表明，意大利麻雀是家麻雀和西班牙麻雀的杂交种，而且意大利麻雀和西班牙麻雀之间已经不再继续杂交繁殖。 参考文献

locations.name: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克
locations.summary: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克（荷蘭語：Coenraad Jacob Temminck，1778年3月31日—1858年1月30日）是一名荷蘭貴族和動物學家。 生平 特明克於阿姆斯特丹出生，1820年出任位於萊頓的國家自然歷史博物館，直至去世。他…

locations.name: 约翰·古尔德
locations.summary: 约翰·古尔德 FRS（英語：John Gould，1804年9月14日—1881年2月3日）是19世纪一位英国鸟类学家。1804年生于英格兰，也是一位商人、艺术家。1838年后与其妻一同前往澳大利亚，在当地发现并為许多新物种命名。 早年…

locations.name: 麻雀科
locations.summary: 雀科（學名：Passeridae，台湾作麻雀科）为鸟纲雀形目的一个科。本科有8屬43種。 分类 淡色石雀属 Carpospiza 淡色石雀 Carpospiza brachydactyla 桂红绣眼鸟属 Hypocryptadius 桂红…

locations.name: 马耳他
locations.summary: 馬爾他共和國（馬爾他語：Repubblika ta' Malta，發音：[ˈmɐːltɐ]；英語：Republic of Malta），通稱馬爾他，係位於南歐的一個共和制微型國家，首都瓦萊塔。馬爾他共和國是位於地中海中心的島國， 由马耳他…

locations.name: 科西嘉
locations.summary: 科西嘉（法語：Corse，法語發音：[kɔʁs] ；科西嘉语、義大利語：Corsica）是地中海西部的一座岛屿，也是法国的一个单一领土集体及18个大区之一，位于法国大陆部分的东南面，意大利半島的西面，最临近的地块是撒丁岛。科西嘉岛三分之二…

locations.name: Enrico Hillyer Giglioli
locations.summary: Enrico Hillyer Giglioli (13 June 1845 – 16 December 1909) was an Italian zoologist and anthropologist.

relations.subject: 義大利麻雀
relations.evidence: The Italian sparrow occurs in northern Italy and neighbouring regions, with intermediates with the house sparrow in a very narrow contact zone in the Alps, a slow gradation in appearance from the Italian to Spanish sparrows across central and southern Italy, and more birds of intermediate appearance in Malta, Crete, and other parts of the Mediterranean

relations.subject: 義大利麻雀

relations.subject: 義大利麻雀
relations.evidence: The Italian sparrow occurs in northern Italy and neighbouring regions, with intermediates with the house sparrow in a very narrow contact zone in the Alps, a slow gradation in appearance from the Italian to Spanish sparrows across central and southern Italy, and more birds of intermediate appearance in Malta, Crete, and other parts of the Mediterranean

relations.subject: 義大利麻雀
relations.evidence: The Italian sparrow is found in northern and central Italy, Corsica, and small parts of France, Switzerland, Austria, and Slovenia. Its distribution was described by Italian zoologist Enrico Hillyer Giglioli in 1881 as professing "'Conservative opinions'; for it keeps strictly within our current political frontiers". At the northernmost edge of its range in the southern Alps, there is a narrow hybrid zone about wide with the house sparrow. In southern Italy, there is a gradual clinal trend with the Spanish sparrow, with birds increasing in their similarity to the Spanish sparrow in appearance and ecology further south, from around Naples to western Sicily, where birds resemble pure Spanish sparrows. However, this trend may be superficial, and the Handbook of the Birds of the World recognises birds from Sicily and Crete as Italian sparrows. Sardinia is occupied by Spanish sparrows, while sparrows on Malta, Crete, and the adjacent islands are intermediates similar to the Italian sparrow.{{cite journal|last=Hartert|first=E.|title=Types of Birds in the Tring Museum

relations.subject: 義大利麻雀
relations.evidence: This hybrid swarm shows a full range of characters from nearly pure house sparrows to nearly pure Spanish sparrows and everything between. The Italian sparrow is associated with human habitations, inhabiting towns, cities, and agricultural areas
